title: Phosphor Legacy Forge
description: Unofficial fork of Phosphor mod ported to Legacy Forge.
body:
# Phosphor Legacy Forge
This is a port of JellySquid's Phosphor mod to Forge 1.8.9 and 1.9.4-1.11.2 .

# Mod Compatibility
Tested with OptiFine, Dynamic Lights, LiteLoader, Essential, Patcher and other coremods.

This mod has included mixin 0.7.11; Should works fine with other mixin 0.7 mods.

If it crashes with LiteLoader, make sure LiteLoader was in mods folder and loads AFTER mixin 0.7/0.8 mods. DO NOT install LiteLoader with Forge as a lib !

Not compatible with Legacy SpongeForge. Due to SpongeForge causes weird invalid mixins crashes and uses extremely outdated mixin versions.

# Credits

JellySquid for making original Phosphor;
(https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor)

Embeddedt for an updated 1.12.2 Phosphor and 1.7.10 Archaic Fix;

Kappa-Maintainer for an updated 1.12.2 Phosphor;
(https://github.com/kappa-maintainer/Hesperus)

Grayray75 for 1.8.9 Legacy Fabric port of Phosphor.
(https://github.com/Grayray75/Phosphor-Legacy)

# DO NOT submit issues of this mod on upsteam repositories!
